zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex於1162年10月14日出生在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里時，他的父親Piers de Lutegareshale28歲，母親Maude Mandeville24歲。他於大約1175年與Beatrice Say Countess of Essex結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他在英國英格蘭倫敦被列為constable of the tower of london。他去世於1213年10月14日在英國諾福爾可守爾達哈姆享年51歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可守爾達哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex于1162年10月14日出生在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里时，他的父亲Piers de Lutegareshale28岁，母亲Maude Mandeville24岁。他于大约1175年与Beatrice Say Countess of Essex结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他在英国英格兰倫敦被列为constable of the tower of london。他去世于1213年10月14日在英国諾福爾可守爾達哈姆享年51岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可守爾達哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex was born on 14 October 1162, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, his father, Piers de Lutegareshale, was 28 and his mother, Maude Mandeville, was 24. He married Beatrice Say Countess of Essex about 1175. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. His occupation is listed as constable of the tower of london in London, England, United Kingdom. He died on 14 October 1213, in Shouldham, Norfolk, England, at the age of 51, and was buried in Shouldham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex est né le 14 octobre 1162, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Piers de Lutegareshale, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Maude Mandeville, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Beatrice Say Countess of Essex environ 1175. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est constable of the tower of london à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 14 octobre 1213, à Shouldham, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Shouldham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex am 14. Oktober 1162 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Piers de Lutegareshale 28 und seine Mutter Maude Mandeville 24. Er hat um 1175 Beatrice Say Countess of Essex geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als constable of the tower of london in London, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 14. Oktober 1213 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Shouldham, Norfolk, England und wurde in Shouldham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex è nato il il 14 ottobre 1162 nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Piers de Lutegareshale, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Maude Mandeville, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Beatrice Say Countess of Essex circa 1175. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come constable of the tower of london nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 14 ottobre 1213, nel Shouldham, Norfolk, England, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Shouldham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essexが1162年10月14日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで生まれた時，父Piers de Lutegareshaleは28歳，母Maude Mandevilleは24歳であった。約1175年にBeatrice Say Countess of Essexと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。イギリスイギリスロンドンでの職業はconstable of the tower of londonと記録されている。彼は1213年10月14日にイギリスノーフォルクショウルドハムで51歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクショウルドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex(이)가 1162년 10월 14일 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Piers de Lutegareshale(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Maude Mandeville(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1175년 Beatrice Say Countess of Essex(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 constable of the tower of london이었다. 그는 1213년 10월 14일 영국 노르폴크 쇼우드함에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 쇼우드함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex nasceu em 14 de outubro de 1162, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Piers de Lutegareshale, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Maude Mandeville, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrice Say Countess of Essex aproximadamente 1175. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como constable of the tower of london em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 14 de outubro de 1213, em Shouldham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Shouldham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey I FitzPiers Earl of Essex родился 14 октября 1162 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Piers de Lutegareshale было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Maude Mandeville, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice Say Countess of Essex около 1175 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери.  Он работал по профессии constable of the tower of london в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 14 октября 1213 г. в местности шоулдхам, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности шоулдхам, норфолк, Англия.

Se casó con Beatrice Say Countess of Essex aproximadamente 1175. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era constable of the tower of london en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 14 de octubre de 1213, en Shouldham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Shouldham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
